[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Sormic''' was the bald, pink-faced commander of an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] training squadron, dubbed Gold Squadron, for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was in charge of the unit while Candidates [[Gara Petothel|Lara Notsil]], [[Lowan]], and [[Lussatte]] were in pilot school, and suggested that Notsil transfer to officer training in astronautics or navigation.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
